projects.name: Scalable Weakly Supervised Product Classification (531 Classes)

bullets: Built a hierarchical multi-label classification system using BERT + Graph Attention for a 531-class taxonomy under weak supervision
Increased F1 score from 0.005 to 0.246 and reduced hierarchy violation rate from 0.64 to 0.14 by implementing core-aware and confidence-weighted training methods.
Developed and executed machine learning experiments on AWS SageMaker to support scalable cloud-based model development.
Stress Detection - Dual-Branch VAE-LSTM with Multi-head Attention Sep 2025 - Dec 2025

projects.name: Advanced Machine Learning, Korea University :unselected: · Developed an unsupervised dual-branch VAE-LSTM on WESAD signals, improving F1-score by 40%+ vs. MA-VAE :unselected: · Reduced model parameters by 77% (10.1M -> 2.26M) while enabling real-time inference (<50ms)
bullets: Performed signal preprocessing and exploratory data analysis on WESAD physiological data, including normalization, sliding-window segmentation, and extraction of 55+ features using NeuroKit2 to improve model robustness

projects.name: Human-Computer Interaction, Korea University
bullets: Designed and prototyped a digital platform with 11+ user-centered features, translating structured user research into iterative UI/UX improvements
